evals.prompt: You are the impact-analysis-agent. For ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load), create a detailed forward and backward impact analysis for the change. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-101.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: impact-analysis-agent correctly create a detailed forward and backward impact analysis for the change for PROJ-101, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Produces both forward and backward impact
Identifies VW_DAILY_POSITIONS as the impacted downstream consumer
Names LOAD_FCT_TRADES as the root-cause object
Makes no changes to any source/model file
